name: PAYOMATIC
description_short: PAYOMATIC Brooklyn, New York — PAYOMATIC is New York's largest check-cashing and financial services provider with nearly 140 stores across the NYC area,...
description_long:
PAYOMATIC is a regional financial services company headquartered in New York that operates nearly 140 locations throughout the Bronx, Brooklyn, Manhattan, Queens, Long Island, and the surrounding NYC area. The company specializes in check-cashing services and has positioned itself as the largest Western Union agent in New York.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of financial services centered around cash access and money movement. Core services include check cashing for payroll, government, and tax checks with no holding period; business check cashing with competitive rates and same-day large payouts; Western Union money transfers to over 200 countries; money orders; bill payment for utilities and major credit cards; and the inPOWER Prepaid Mastercard—a branded prepaid debit card available exclusively at PAYOMATIC stores. The company also offers prepaid mobile top-ups and direct deposit services.

PAYOMATIC distinguishes itself through its extensive physical network in the New York market, same-day cash availability without holding periods, and specialized business check-cashing services tailored to business owners. The company emphasizes convenience with extended store hours (8 AM–10 PM on Fridays) and multiple neighborhood locations. They market themselves as "New York's largest and most convenient provider" of these services.

As a check-cashing and money services business, PAYOMATIC is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers in the NYC area who need immediate cash access, small business owners requiring quick check conversion, and individuals sending money internationally via Western Union. The company's value proposition centers on speed and convenience rather than lending products or credit services. Potential limitations include geographic restriction to the New York area and lack of information about fee structures on their public website.
pros: Nearly 140 stores across NYC area provides exceptional convenience and accessibility
Check cashing with no holding period—cash available immediately upon processing
Largest Western Union agent in New York with money transfer to 200+ countries
Specialized business check-cashing services with same-day large payouts for business owners
Extended hours including Friday until 10 PM and Saturday/Sunday service
Over 100 bill pay companies available including utilities and major credit cards
inPOWER Prepaid Mastercard exclusively available at PAYOMATIC stores with 24/7 mobile app access
cons: Geographic limitation to New York area—cannot serve customers outside NYC region
No fee information disclosed on website, making cost comparison difficult for consumers
Check-cashing business model means high fees likely compared to traditional banks
No lending products or credit-building services offered
Limited online service capabilities—primarily requires in-store visits for transactions
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked residents of NYC needing immediate check-cashing without holding periods
Small business owners requiring quick conversion of business checks to cash with large same-day payouts
International money senders using Western Union to transfer funds to family abroad
NYC residents seeking to consolidate financial services (bill pay, money orders, prepaid card) at neighborhood locations
diagnosis: PAYOMATIC is best for unbanked/underbanked NYC residents and small business owners who need immediate cash access and money services without traditional banking relationships. The main caveat is that check-cashing and money services typically carry higher fees than bank accounts, and the service is geographically limited to the New York area only.
services: Check cashing for payroll, government, and tax checks
Business check cashing with competitive rates and large same-day payouts
Western Union money transfers to 200+ countries
Bill payment for 100+ companies including Con Edison, NYCHA, Verizon, Spectrum, Optimum, National Grid, Dish Network
inPOWER Prepaid Mastercard with mobile app
Debit card and prepaid card loading
